name: Zeus
description: Immortality was overrated. This is much more interesting. Zeus, the Lord of Heaven All of the Zeus' abilities, and his attacks, excluding item abilities, deals damage equal to a percentage of the affected enemy units' current health.

abilities.name: Static Field
abilities.description: All of the Zeus' abilities, and his attacks, excluding item abilities, deals damage equal to a percentage of the affected enemy units' current health.

abilities.name: Arc Lightning
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning that bounce through nearby enemy units that deals damage.

abilities.name: Lightning Bolt
abilities.description: Calls down a bolt of lightning to strike an enemy unit, causing damage and applies a stun. Can be cast on the ground, affecting the closest enemy hero within the search radius.

abilities.name: Heavenly Jump
abilities.description: Leaps forward and shocks the closest visible nearby enemy unit, prioritizing heroes, dealing damage as well as reducing their movement and attack speed. Cannot cast ability while being affected by sources. However, the Root source application does not nullify the ability once it is cast.

abilities.name: Nimbus
abilities.description: Creates a storm cloud anywhere on the map that automatically casts Lightning Bolt on nearby enemy units.

abilities.name: Lightning Hands
abilities.description: Attacks now create Arc Lightning that deal a percentage of its damage. Can be toggled off to stop this effect. Grants bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Thundergod's Wrath
abilities.description: Briefly provides True Sight when cast, centered around the target within the radius. If an enemy hero is invisible, it takes no damage, but the True Sight radius is still created at that hero's location. The ability component is granted by an aura and is independent of the vision radius.
